steps: Wash in running tap water for 3 minutes
Place in Bouins for one hour in 55 -56 degree oven or overnight at room temperature if needed.
Wash well in running water for 5-10 minutes or until yellow is gone.
Stain in Weigerts Hematoxylin for 10-20 minutes (usually 10 minutes).
Wash well in running water for 10 minutes.
Place slides in Biebrich Scarlet-Acid Fuchsin for 5-10 minutes.
Place slides in the Phosphomolybdic-Phosphotungstic Acid Solution in a plastic coplin jar for 10-15 minutes or until collagen fibers are not red.
Place slides in Aniline Blue solution for 10 minutes.
Place in 1% Acetic acid for 3 minutes.
Mount slides with mounting medium- 1 drop
creator: Lili Liang
